description_long: This is a fantasy-themed dagger with a straight, double-edged blade featuring glowing blue runic engravings along its length. The crossguard is ornate, shaped like a pair of stylized black wings or claws, and is adorned with a central skull motif, giving the weapon a menacing appearance. The handle is cylindrical, wrapped in alternating bands of orange and black, and topped with a rounded black pommel. The overall design is highly decorative, with intricate details and a dark, mystical aesthetic. The blade appears metallic, while the handle and guard incorporate both metal and possibly resin or wood elements. This object is visually striking and would stand out as a display piece or prop in an urban fantasy setting.
description: A highly ornate fantasy dagger with a glowing runic blade, winged crossguard, skull motif, and a banded handle with a rounded pommel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full blade with blue runes, winged crossguard, and skull centerpiece.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the profile of the skull and crossguard.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with visible runes and symmetrical guard details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the blade's thinness and the side profile of the skull and guard.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, banded with orange and black, rounded black pommel, decorative
attribute_ornamentation: skull motif, winged crossguard, blue runic engravings
